creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm not sure MFH'ing to the branch is a good idea, vala tends to break things between major releases. Some of the bindings (GStreamer and Webkit2-gtk3) are updated to versions only found in ports/HEAD, I didn't see any security notices either in the changelogs. Is there a specific reason why you would want to MFH vala?
